prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Lua. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```lua
#!/usr/bin/env lua

local function die(msg)
    io.stderr:write("minigit: " .. msg .. "\n")
    os.exit(1)
end

local function usage()
    io.stderr:write("Usage: minigit <command> [<args>...]\n")
    os.exit(1)
end

local function ensure_minigit_dir()
    local ok, err, code = os.rename(".minigit", ".minigit")
    if not ok and code == 13 then
        die("fatal: not a minigit repository")
    end
end

local function cmd_init()
    local ok, err = os.rename(".minigit", ".minigit")
    if ok then
        die("fatal: already a minigit repository")
    end
    os.execute("mkdir -p .minigit")
    os.execute("mkdir -p .minigit/objects")
    os.execute("echo ref: refs/heads/main > .minigit/HEAD")
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_hash_object(path)
    if not path then die("usage: minigit hash-object <file>") end
    local f, err = io.open(path, "rb")
    if not f then die("cannot open '" .. path .. "': " .. err) end
    local content = f:read("*a")
    f:close()
    local size = #content
    local header = "blob " .. size .. "\0"
    local store = header .. content
    local hash = ""
    local pipe = io.popen("echo " .. os.quote(store) .. " | sha1sum", "r")
    if pipe then
        hash = pipe:read("*a"):match("^(%x+)")
        pipe:close()
    end
    local dir = ".minigit/objects/" .. hash:sub(1,2)
    local file = dir .. "/" .. hash:sub(3)
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. dir)
    local out, err = io.open(file, "wb")
    if not out then die("cannot write object: " .. err) end
    local compressed = require("zlib").deflate()(store, "finish")
    out:write(compressed)
    out:close()
    print(hash)
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_cat_file(hash)
    if not hash then die("usage: minigit cat-file <hash>") end
    local dir = ".minigit/objects/" .. hash:sub(1,2)
    local file = dir .. "/" .. hash:sub(3)
    local f, err = io.open(file, "rb")
    if not f then die("cannot find object " .. hash) end
    local compressed = f:read("*a")
    f:close()
    local store = require("zlib").inflate()(compressed)
    local header, content = store:match("^([^%z]+)%z(.*)$")
    io.write(content)
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_update_index(path)
    if not path then die("usage: minigit update-index <file>") end
    ensure_minigit_dir()
    local f, err = io.open(path, "rb")
    if not f then die("cannot open '" .. path .. "': " .. err) end
    local content = f:read("*a")
    f:close()
    local size = #content
    local header = "blob " .. size .. "\0"
    local store = header .. content
    local hash = ""
    local pipe = io.popen("echo " .. os.quote(store) .. " | sha1sum", "r")
    if pipe then
        hash = pipe:read("*a"):match("^(%x+)")
        pipe:close()
    end
    local index = {}
    local idxfile = io.open(".minigit/index", "r")
    if idxfile then
        for line in idxfile:lines() do
            local mode, name, objhash = line:match("^(%d+) (%S+) (%x+)$")
            if mode then index[name] = {mode=mode, hash=objhash} end
        end
        idxfile:close()
    end
    index[path] = {mode="100644", hash=hash}
    local tmp = ".minigit/index.tmp"
    local out, err = io.open(tmp, "w")
    if not out then die("cannot write index: " .. err) end
    for name, ent in pairs(index) do
        out:write(ent.mode .. " " .. name .. " " .. ent.hash .. "\n")
    end
    out:close()
    os.rename(tmp, ".minigit/index")
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_write_tree()
    ensure_minigit_dir()
    local tree = {}
    local idxfile = io.open(".minigit/index", "r")
    if not idxfile then die("fatal: index file empty") end
    for line in idxfile:lines() do
        local mode, name, hash = line:match("^(%d+) (%S+) (%x+)$")
        if mode then
            table.insert(tree, mode .. " " .. name .. "\0" .. hash)
        end
    end
    idxfile:close()
    table.sort(tree)
    local body = table.concat(tree)
    local size = #body
    local header = "tree " .. size .. "\0"
    local store = header .. body
    local hash = ""
    local pipe = io.popen("echo " .. os.quote(store) .. " | sha1sum", "r")
    if pipe then
        hash = pipe:read("*a"):match("^(%x+)")
        pipe:close()
    end
    local dir = ".minigit/objects/" .. hash:sub(1,2)
    local file = dir .. "/" .. hash:sub(3)
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. dir)
    local out, err = io.open(file, "wb")
    if not out then die("cannot write object: " .. err) end
    local compressed = require("zlib").deflate()(store, "finish")
    out:write(compressed)
    out:close()
    print(hash)
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_commit_tree(tree, p, m)
    if not tree or not p or not m then
        die("usage: minigit commit-tree <tree> -p <parent> -m <message>")
    end
    ensure_minigit_dir()
    local parent = p
    local message = m
    local author = "Author <author@example.com>"
    local committer = "Committer <committer@example.com>"
    local body = "tree " .. tree .. "\nparent " .. parent .. "\nauthor " .. author .. "\ncommitter " .. committer .. "\n\n" .. message .. "\n"
    local size = #body
    local header = "commit " .. size .. "\0"
    local store = header .. body
    local hash = ""
    local pipe = io.popen("echo " .. os.quote(store) .. " | sha1sum", "r")
    if pipe then
        hash = pipe:read("*a"):match("^(%x+)")
        pipe:close()
    end
    local dir = ".minigit/objects/" .. hash:sub(1,2)
    local file = dir .. "/" .. hash:sub(3)
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. dir)
    local out, err = io.open(file, "wb")
    if not out then die("cannot write object: " .. err) end
    local compressed = require("zlib").deflate()(store, "finish")
    out:write(compressed)
    out:close()
    print(hash)
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_update_ref(ref, hash)
    if not ref or not hash then die("usage: minigit update-ref <ref> <hash>") end
    ensure_minigit_dir()
    local name = ref
    if name:sub(1,5) ~= "refs/" then name = "refs/heads/" .. name end
    local dir = ".minigit/" .. name:match("^(.*)/")
    os.execute("mkdir -p " .. dir)
    local out, err = io.open(".minigit/" .. name, "w")
    if not out then die("cannot write ref: " .. err) end
    out:write(hash)
    out:close()
    os.exit(0)
end

local function cmd_rev_parse(name)
    if not name then die("usage: minigit rev-parse <ref>") end
    ensure_minigit_dir()
    local ref = name
    while true do
        local f, err = io.open(".minigit/" .. ref, "r")
        if f then
            local content = f:read("*a"):gsub("\n$", "")
            f:close()
            if content:match("^ref: ") then
                ref = content:match("^ref: (.+)$")
            else
                print(content)
                os.exit(0)
            end
        else
            die("fatal: ambiguous argument '" .. name .. "': unknown revision")
        end
    end
end

local function main()
    local cmd = arg[1]
    if not cmd then usage() end
    if cmd == "init" then
        cmd_init()
    elseif cmd == "hash-object" then
        cmd_hash_object(arg[2])
    elseif cmd == "cat-file" then
        cmd_cat_file(arg[2])
    elseif cmd == "update-index" then
        cmd_update_index(arg[2])
    elseif cmd == "write-tree" then
        cmd_write_tree()
    elseif cmd == "commit-tree" then
        cmd_commit_tree(arg[2], arg[3], arg[5])
    elseif cmd == "update-ref" then
        cmd_update_ref(arg[2], arg[3])
    elseif cmd == "rev-parse" then
        cmd_rev_parse(arg[2])
    else
        die("unknown command " .. cmd)
    end
end

os.quote = function(s)
    return "'" .. s:gsub("'", "'\\''") .. "'"
end

main()
```
